data.title: Over 1M users join VeChain's Greencart app rewarding sustainable shopping with B3TR tokens, distributing $1.2M in rewards.
data.description: A program called Greencart is incentivizing sustainable shopping by offering B3TR tokens on the VeChainThor blockchain. They have processed more than 1 million verified receipts and distributed rewards amounting to $1.2 million. This initiative encourages eco-friendly consumer habits and promotes transparency in transactions.

data.title: InScribe Selected to Support Initiative to Improve Online Student Belonging and Persistence
data.description: A collaboration between Alamo Colleges District, Rio Salado College, and WCET aims to tackle the issue of social disconnection among online students, a factor that often results in dropouts. InScribe Education, a top provider of digital communities and online engagement advisory services, is at the forefront of this partnership. This initiative comes at a time when dropout rates for online students stand at a concerning [insert specific percentage here], highlighting the urgency for effective solutions to enhance social connectivity and retention in online education.

data.title: Worldcoin trading at $0.32 sees bearish MACD signals; oversold RSI at 37.64 hints at potential bounce to $0.34 resistance level soon.
data.description: The stock symbol WLD is currently trading at $0.32 and is showing bearish MACD signals. However, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 37.64, indicating that the stock is oversold. This could potentially lead to a bounce in the coming week, with the price possibly reaching the resistance level of $0.34.

data.title: Constructor Unveils Merchant Intelligence Agent (MIA), Bringing Instant Insight and Faster Action to Ecommerce Merchandising
data.description: At Shoptalk Booth #3255, a new AI agent was introduced to assist retailers in improving shopping experiences. This agent provides product discovery results, recommendations for next steps, and automates actions. The debut took place in San Francisco and Las Vegas on March 24, 2026. Known as Constructor, this AI aims to revolutionize customer engagement in the retail sector.

data.title: Tammy Deschler of YMX Logistics Named a 2026 "Top Woman to Watch in Trucking" by Women in Trucking Association
data.description: Recognized for exceptional contributions to the industry, leadership excellence, and advocacy for women in transportation, YMX Logistics of Henderson, Nevada was honored on March 24, 2026. As a leading national third-party logistics provider specializing in integrated yard logistics, YMX Logistics has been at the forefront of transforming the sector. This recognition underscores their dedication to innovation and inclusivity in an industry that relies on efficiency and adaptability.

data.title: CACI to Enhance U.S. Navy Cybersecurity and Engineering Capabilities
data.description: CACI International Inc revealed its recent achievement in securing a significant five-year task order from the U.S. Navy Naval Surface Warfare Center (NSWC) Carderock Division's Naval Architecture and Engineering Department. The task order, valued at a maximum of $85 million, emphasizes the continuation of supplying essential engineering and technical assistance for naval vessels including ships, submarines, and other related vehicles. This contract signifies CACI's dedication to supporting the U.S. Navy's fleet in maintaining advanced capabilities to outpace potential threats.

data.title: Congregation Mickve Israel Announces the "America 250" Exhibit Honoring The Declaration of Independence and Religious Liberty
data.description: Celebrating the nation's 250th anniversary, Savannah's historic congregation presents an exhibition on faith, freedom, and civic leadership. Located in Savannah, Georgia, Congregation Mickve Israel, the third oldest Jewish congregation in the US, showcases the timely exhibition. The exhibition delves into the intersections of faith, freedom, and civic leadership, marking an important milestone for the congregation and the nation.

data.title: RMX Industries, Inc. Appoints VStock Transfer as Transfer Agent
data.description: Today, RMX Industries, Inc. (OTCQB: RMXI) from Dallas revealed their appointment of Vstock Transfer as the new transfer agent and registrar for their common stock, effective immediately. Shareholders of the Company are advised to reach out to VStock for further information.

data.title: Flowfinity Celebrates 10 Years of Infrastructure Partnership with Cogent Communications
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 24, 2026, Flowfinity Inc commemorated a decade of collaboration with Cogent Communications, a major Tier 1 global Internet Services Provider. This partnership has resulted in a reliable network infrastructure for clients, emphasizing security and efficiency. The milestone marks ten years of successful cooperation in meeting clients' connectivity requirements.

data.title: Change to the publication date of Business Review: Bioretec publishes January-March 2026 Business Review on 15 May 2026
data.description: Bioretec Ltd has updated its financial calendar for the year 2026. The company will be releasing its January-March 2026 Business Review on 15 May 2026 instead of the previously announced date of 14 May 2026. The announcement was made on 24 March 2026 at 1:45 p.m. EET in Tampere, Finland. For further details, interested parties can contact Sarah van.

data.title: NiCE Named to Fast Company’s Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: NiCE, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol NICE, was recently included in Fast Company's list of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026. The company secured the 11th position in the Applied AI category out of 720 recognized honorees across 59 sectors and regions. Notable achievements include the acquisition of Cognigy in 2025, which marked a significant milestone for the company.

data.title: KYOCERA AVX Showcases Power Electronics Components at APEC 2026
data.description: The exhibit showcases cutting-edge electronic components designed for exceptional performance in various sectors, such as 5G, IoT, military, aerospace, automotive, and medical fields. The featured products, including varistors, capacitors, and connectors, are tailored to meet the demands of high-power, high-energy, and high-efficiency applications. These components are optimized for use in challenging environments with emphasis on reliability and performance. The exhibit at Fountain Inn presents a range of advanced technologies catering to different industries and applications, contributing to the advancement of electronic systems.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Edges Lower After Rebound; Oil Prices Bounce (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to a rise in oil prices. Both Nvidia and Palantir are currently approaching critical resistance levels. Today's stock market report indicates that the Dow slightly decreased following a rebound, while oil prices showed an increase. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Matricelf (TASE: MTLF) Enters Strategic Collaboration with Sheba Medical Center to Advance First in Human Clinical Program in Spinal Cord Injury
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on March 24, 2026, Matricelf Ltd. (TASE: MTLF) shared news of a vital partnership with Sheba Medical Center, Tel Hashomer, recognized as the 7th top medical facility globally by Newsweek. Matricelf is a regenerative medicine firm specializing in autologous engineered neural tissue treatments. This collaboration between the two entities aims to propel advancements in this cutting-edge field.

data.title: New Nutrition Research Links Fresh Pork to Muscle Health, Recovery, and Healthy Aging
data.description: New research conducted in Des Moines, Iowa, has revealed promising findings related to the benefits of pork-based meals. Three recent nutrition studies highlighted the positive impact of these meals on different groups. The studies indicated that such meals support functional strength in older adults, stimulate post-exercise muscle protein synthesis, and enhance readiness and recovery in Army cadets. These studies have been published in peer-reviewed journals and have garnered attention for their significant findings. The research, conducted in March 2026, reinforces the idea that incorporating pork-based meals into diets could provide valuable advantages for various demographic groups.

data.title: X Square Robot and Global Partners Launch ManipArena at CVPR 2026
data.description: A groundbreaking milestone has been achieved in evaluating real-world embodied intelligence by the launch of the X Square Robot in SHENZHEN, China on March 24, 2026. The company, well-known for its expertise in general-purpose embodied intelligence, has emerged as a key founding partner in "ManipArena." This launch has established a new global standard in this field, showcasing the significance of this achievement.

data.title: Saudi Fund for Development Signs USD 75 Million Agreement to Strengthen Regional Connectivity in Cameroon
data.description: In Yaoundé, Cameroon, the Saudi Fund for Development has entered into an agreement worth USD 75 million to enhance regional connectivity within the country.

data.title: U.S. Home Prices Barely Budged in February
data.description: In February, U.S. home prices experienced minimal growth, with a 0.1% increase from the previous month on a seasonally adjusted basis. This marks the slowest growth rate in seven months. Year over year, home prices saw a 1.9% rise. These findings were revealed in a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage powered by Rocket. The Redfin Home Price Index (RHPI), utilizing the repeat-sales pricing method, determines seasonally adjusted fluctuations in single-family home prices.
